scripts.verify:week3:backend: sh -ac 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST="$DATABASE_URL_TEST"; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST" ] && DATABASE_URL_TEST="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST"; [ -n "$DATABASE_URL_TEST" ] || { echo "DATABASE_URL_TEST is required"; exit 1; }; pnpm -w vitest packages/core/src/week3.integration.test.ts --run && pnpm -w vitest apps/web/app/api/week3.integration.test.ts --run'
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs --tail=200 postgres bootstrap web worker
scripts.infra:refresh-postgres: pnpm infra:pull && docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate postgres bootstrap web worker && pnpm db:wait
scripts.infra:reset-db: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.db:validate: sh scripts/with-local-env.sh pnpm --filter @scouting-platform/db exec prisma validate
scripts.db:migrate:test: sh -ac 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST="$DATABASE_URL_TEST"; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST" ] && DATABASE_URL_TEST="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL_TEST"; [ -n "$DATABASE_URL_TEST" ] || { echo "DATABASE_URL_TEST is required"; exit 1; }; DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_TEST" pnpm --filter @scouting-platform/db db:migrate:deploy'
